message:
test(ft-conformance): linalg.slogdet numpy subprocess conformance [bd-c36b]

Adds torch_linalg_slogdet_numpy_subprocess_conformance covering 14
matrices: identity, scaled-identity, diagonal (positive and mixed-
sign), upper triangular, negative-determinant 2x2 (sign = -1),
singular 2x2 / 3x3 (sign = 0, logabsdet = -inf), large-magnitude
diag (100^8 — overflows direct det but fine in log space),
tiny-magnitude diag (0.01^8 — underflows direct det), 1x1 corner
cases (positive, negative, zero scalar), and a general nonsingular
3x3.

Sign is checked exactly (it's an integer in {-1, 0, 1}); logabsdet
is checked relative-1e-9 since the LU factorization conditioning
gives that bound for the matrices here.

Sister harness to torch_linalg_det_numpy_subprocess_conformance —
same numpy oracle, same fail-loud structure. Files closure for the
slogdet slice of frankentorch-c36b.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
